text: Hello? Yeah. Who's this? Hello. Good afternoon. This is Alyssa. I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through New Jersey state relief program. So have you been notified about these benefits yet? No. Oh, that's all right. That's exactly why I'm calling. I want to help you get these benefits processed before they go unclaimed. You're covered under both part A and part B, yes? Oh, yes. Perfect. You qualify for the benefits. I'm forwarding you to our supervisor. Please hold on. Thanks for holding on the line. My name is Christopher. How are you doing today? I can barely hear you. My phone is asking you know, what did you say? I said, how are you?
